statement: In every magma, Equation 1723 (`x = (y * y) * ((x * y) * z)`) implies Equation 53 (`x = x * (y * (x * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0674
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y y) (op (op x y) z))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op x (op y (op x y)))
